macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: New York Fed Beige Book Reports Modest Economic Decline Amid Tariff and Middle East Uncertainty
items.summary: Economic activity in the Second District declined modestly due to tariff policy shifts and Middle East conflict, with steady employment, modest wage growth, moderate selling price increases, and sharp input cost rises especially in energy, steel, and electronics. Businesses expect continued pricing pressures, though manufacturers are optimistic.
items.source: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

items.title: US Stocks Hit Record Highs as TSMC Raises Outlook Amid US-Iran Truce Talks
items.summary: S&P 500 closed above 7,000 for the first time, with futures up 0.2% and Nasdaq 100 contracts up 0.4%, fueled by Taiwan Semiconductor's upbeat AI chip demand forecast and optimism over US-Iran ceasefire extension negotiations. Brent oil hovered at $95/barrel, gold neared $4,825/oz, amid naval blockade in Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: US-Iran Consider Ceasefire Extension as Tensions Persist Over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: US and Iran weigh two-week truce extension amid high tensions, with US naval blockade forcing 10 Iranian vessels to turn around in the oil-critical Strait of Hormuz shuttered for seven weeks. Investors focus on market fundamentals despite war concerns.

items.title: Argentina's Milei Faces Inflation Rebound and Crypto Scandal Amid Middle East War Impacts
items.summary: President Milei's shock therapy cut annual inflation to 31% but monthly rate rose to 2.9% in early 2026, tied to price control removal, utility hikes, and expected energy/food price rises from Middle East conflict; ongoing $Libra crypto scandal erodes anti-corruption image ahead of elections.

items.title: Key US Economic Data Releases Scheduled Including ISM Manufacturing PMI and Retail Sales
items.summary: Upcoming indicators show mixed signals: Chicago PMI at 52.8, S&P Global Manufacturing PMI final at 51.6, ISM Manufacturing PMI expected around 52.4, Retail Sales MoM at -0.2%, amid GDP revisions and jobless claims.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges to $76,000 Amid Record Stock Market Highs
items.summary: Bitcoin rallied to a multi-month high of $76,000, up nearly 10% in the past two weeks, as Nasdaq hit 24,016 and S&P 500 surpassed 7,000. The surge aligns with positive market sentiment from potential US-Iran ceasefire extensions.

items.title: $321 Million in Crypto Contracts Liquidated Across Network
items.summary: Total cryptocurrency futures liquidations reached $321 million in the past 24 hours, with $170 million in long positions and $151 million in shorts; BTC saw $107 million and ETH $85 million in liquidations.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation Executive Josh Stark Announces Departure
items.summary: Josh Stark, executive at the Ethereum Foundation, has announced his departure, marking a notable change in the organization's leadership.

items.title: Uniswap Launches Official Developer Platform with AI Toolkits
items.summary: Uniswap released the official version of its developer platform, featuring API dashboards and AI toolkits to enhance development capabilities.

items.title: Rhea Finance Hit by Attack, $7.6 Million Stolen via Fake Tokens
items.summary: Security agency reports Rhea Finance suffered an attack involving fake token contracts, resulting in approximately $7.6 million stolen.

items.title: Spektr Raises $20 Million in Series A for Financial Compliance
items.summary: Financial compliance startup Spektr secured $20 million in Series A funding led by NEA, focusing on blockchain-related compliance solutions.

items.title: Binance Appoints Thiago Sarandy as Brazil President
items.summary: Binance named Thiago Sarandy as President of its Brazil operations, aiming to strengthen its presence in the region.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.7, Its Most Powerful AI Model Yet
items.summary: Anthropic introduced an updated Opus 4.7 model, excelling in software engineering and hard coding tasks. A more advanced model called Mythos was deemed too dangerous for public release.

items.title: Google Launches Gemini Subagents, Native Mac App, New TTS Model, and API Updates
items.summary: Google released Gemini subagents outperforming Claude in code tasks, a native Mac app, a new text-to-speech model, Gemini CLI, and prepay billing for the API.
items.source: AI News & Strategy Daily via YouTube

items.title: OpenAI Updates Agents SDK with Sandboxing and Enhanced Harness
items.summary: OpenAI added a more capable harness and native sandbox execution to its Agents SDK, improving agent security and functionality.
items.source: AI News & Strategy Daily via YouTube

items.title: Enterprises Face Security Challenges as AI Agents Projected to Outnumber Humans
items.summary: Experts predict developer numbers could grow from 150 million to 3 billion agent builders in a year, urging new agent-era security models amid risks from nation-states and bad actors.
items.source: The Deep View Conversations via YouTube

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Dolphin Emulator Launches Dolphin XR Fork for VR Gaming
items.summary: A new fork of the Dolphin emulator called Dolphin XR is in active development, aiming to enhance VR emulation capabilities for retro gaming. The update is highlighted as a significant upgrade addressing previous VR issues.

items.title: Path of Exile Leagues Update Deemed 'Best Ever' with Smooth Release
items.summary: The latest Path of Exile leagues update launched successfully with only a minor 15-minute delay, praised as one of the smoothest releases compared to past problematic launches.

items.title: Blizzard Releases Major Updates on Midnight Project
items.summary: Blizzard has dropped significant updates on their upcoming project Midnight, generating excitement among fans as it officially arrives.

items.title: Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss Receives Full Review Post-100% Completion
items.summary: A detailed review of the narrative puzzle game Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss highlights its technical issues and difficulty but notes some redeemable qualities ahead of full release.

items.title: Fallout 76 Public Test Server Restores Game Sound with New Content Testing
items.summary: Fallout 76's PTS update brings back game audio while testing new features, as covered in recent gameplay footage.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
